title: entity descriptor
text: entity descriptor A runtime object that describes a modeled entity. It is used when creating a table for the entity and when converting entity data between DBMS formats or XML formats. Compare with signature descriptor. Description of an entity, stored in ULANA/USYSANA when a model is analyzed. Related Links entity A development object that defines a logical data aggregation and its associated default characteristics and behavior. It may be mapped to a table in a database, but it can also represent transient data, a collection of controls, or constant data. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
